cadence_note: BIS topics refresh on their own schedules (policy rates and exchange rates daily; banking, debt securities and credit statistics quarterly; the CPMI Red Book annually) per https://www.bis.org/statistics/relcal.htm. A weekly tick covers the fastest topics; MAINTAIN_SPECS then skips any topic whose bulk zip ETag/Last-Modified is unchanged, so an off-cycle run costs 27 HEAD requests.
